title: BIT.TRIP RUNNER

notes: Download the game !!! don't start it !!! -> open the gamefiles (properties -> local files -> browse local files)  -> remove the folder Dependencies  -> use protontricks 63710 d3dcompiler_43 d3dx9_43  ... *have fun playing* | removing dependencies removes the openal installer which breaks sound and the 2 directx 9 components are needed if you want to play the latest available version and not the opengl one
title: BIT.TRIP RUNNER

notes: Guide: a.) Download game !! don't start !! b.) go to game folder (properties -> local files -> browse local files) and delete folder dependencies c.) start game once (let it fail but the prefix is created) d.) install with winetricks or protontricks d3dx9_43 d3dcompiler_43
title: BIT.TRIP RUNNER

notes:
Followed instructions from other reports:
1. Install game
2. Delete Dependencies Folder
3. Launch game to generate wine prefix
4. Use winetricks to install d3dcompiler_43 d3dx9_43

Game runs perfectly after those steps.
title: BIT.TRIP RUNNER

notes: Runs after these tweaks: delete "Dependencies" folder right after install, run game to generate wineprefix, install d3dcompiler_43 and d3dx9_43 with protontricks. P.S. In protontricks GUI mode, there may be no d3dcompiler_43, only d3dcompiler_47. Don't install it, just install d3dcompiler_43 from terminal (protontricks 63710 d3dcompiler_43).
title: BIT.TRIP RUNNER

notes: Gives the error "Can't load vertex shaders"
title: BIT.TRIP RUNNER

notes:
Like others day, delete the "Dependencies" folder from the game directory, attempt to run the game (it will crash), then run

WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/63710/pfx/ winetricks d3dcompiler_43 d3dx9_4

On the command-line. Then it will work perfectly.
title: BIT.TRIP RUNNER

notes:
As said by previous users : install, delete folder Dependencies, run "protontricks 63710 d3dcompiler_43 d3dx9_43"
 ; then it works
